title: lastrea filix-mas subvar. apiciflora
intro: Lastrea filix-mas subvar. apiciflora, also known as the lady fern, is a subspecies of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea and the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lastrea filix-mas subvar. apiciflora include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
